rationale: The citing paper references Yang et al. (2022) only once in a broad literature-summary sentence about how emotionally positive, high-arousal marketing content can attract attention. The citation is used as background context to motivate a contrast with the paper's own cringe-focused predictions, not as a core theoretical or methodological basis. There is no direct reuse, extension, refinement, or critique of the cited paper's specific framework or empirical approach.
